title: bupleurum lancifolium subsp. subovatum
intro: Bupleurum lancifolium subsp. subovatum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as a type of Chinese or Japanese barberry. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum lancifolium subsp. subovatum include its ability to support liver and immune system function, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Bupleurum lancifolium subsp. subovatum can be prepared as a decoction or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
